summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Purchases & Purchase Returns module. Backend: 15/16 tests passed (93.75%). Frontend: All key UI elements verified. The module correctly implements Payment column with Paid/Due/Partial badges, Mark as Paid modal, Settings Modal with Order Type/GST/Purchase On/LIFA-LILA options, two-row sticky footer, and supplier outstanding tracking.

minor.issue: Endpoint uses product ID not SKU - test script issue, not backend bug. Backend correctly updates product LP on confirmed purchase.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge intercepts pointer events on bottom-right buttons. Requires force=True or JS click to bypass.

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 - charts may not render properly on initial load

backend: GET /api/purchases with status and supplier filters
POST /api/purchases creates confirmed credit purchase and adds to supplier outstanding
POST /api/purchases creates confirmed cash purchase (auto-marked as paid)
POST /api/purchases confirmed purchase creates stock batch with PTR and batch_priority
POST /api/purchases/{id}/pay marks purchase as paid and reduces supplier outstanding
POST /api/purchases/{id}/pay partial payment sets status to 'partial'
POST /api/purchases/{id}/pay rejects payment for already paid purchase (400)
GET /api/purchases/{id} returns purchase details with items
POST /api/purchases with different order_types (direct, credit, consignment)
POST /api/purchases auto-calculates due_date for credit purchases
frontend: PurchasesList page loads with Purchases/Returns tabs
Payment column header visible in table
Due badge clickable - opens Mark as Paid modal
Mark as Paid modal shows purchase info, amount, payment methods (CASH/Bank/CHEQUE/UPI)
New Purchase button navigates to PurchaseNew page
PurchaseNew has Top Controls (PO #, Gate Pass, Settings gear)
Settings Modal opens with Order Type, GST, Purchase On, Batch Priority options
LIFA/LILA toggle buttons in Settings Modal
Bill Date and Due Date pickers work
Product search and add to table works
Items table has Free Qty, PTR, LIFA columns
Per-row LIFA/LILA dropdown in items table
Two-row sticky footer visible (Items/Qty row + Total/Actions row)
Invoice Breakdown modal shows on Confirm Purchase click
Invoice Breakdown shows Supplier, Items, Qty, Subtotal, GST, Round Off, Grand Total, Due Date

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly updates product.landing_price_per_unit to PTR on confirmed purchase (line 5361-5370)
Backend correctly adds to supplier.outstanding on credit purchase (line 5386-5394)
Backend correctly reduces supplier.outstanding and adds to payment_history on payment (line 5591-5614)
Stock batch created with ptr_per_unit, lp_per_unit, and batch_priority fields (line 5339-5358)
Cash purchases auto-marked as paid when confirmed (line 5291-5292)
Due date auto-calculated based on supplier payment_terms_days (line 5295-5303)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created multiple test purchases with various statuses (draft, confirmed), payment statuses (unpaid, partial, paid), and order types (direct, credit, consignment). Test suppliers and products were used from existing data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchases module fully functional. Key data-testids: purchases-tab, returns-tab, new-purchase-btn, supplier-filter, status-filter, payment-filter, supplier-selector, invoice-no-input, bill-date-btn, due-date-btn, product-search, batch-{n}, expiry-{n}, qty-{n}, free-{n}, ptr-{n}, mrp-{n}, gst-{n}, lifa-{n}, save-draft-btn, confirm-btn, settings-btn, po-btn, gatepass-btn, payment-amount, confirm-payment-btn. PO # and Gate Pass buttons show 'Coming soon' toast (MOCKED - UI placeholders only).
